name: goindexer
description: Semantic code search and codebase understanding via MCP. Uses tree-sitter chunking, Ollama embeddings, and SQLite vector search.

settings.name: Embedding model
settings.description: Ollama embedding model. (I recommend qwen3-embedding:4b running on laptops.)

settings.name: Ollama URL
settings.description: Ollama API URL (paste the default: http://localhost:11434)
